title: USDC Layer Spec Mapping Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json — the layer spec field set, primChildren maintenance, subLayer/Retiming agreement, and relocates value-shape rules are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds the USDC-specific mapping: Crate spec form 7 -> layer spec, per-field name resolution, and per-field Crate value-representation type bindings.

storage_mapping.rule: A SPECS entry with form=7 produces the root layer spec at path '/'. Every Crate layer contains exactly one form-7 spec. Authored layer-level fields come from the FIELDSETS group whose start is given by the SPECS entry's field_set_index.

field_resolution.primChildren: FIELDS token name 'primChildren'; value type 41 (TokenVector) offset-backed; ordered list of root prim names. Materialized from root prim spec storage when absent.
field_resolution.primOrder: FIELDS token name 'primOrder'; value type 41 (TokenVector) offset-backed
field_resolution.defaultPrim: FIELDS token name 'defaultPrim'; value type 11 (token) inlined
field_resolution.subLayers: FIELDS token name 'subLayers'; value type 12 (asset) with the Array flag set; element count followed by uint32 string indices into STRINGS for each asset reference
field_resolution.subLayerOffsets: FIELDS token name 'subLayerOffsets'; value type 49 (LayerOffsetVector); decoded as a sequence of (offset:double, scale:double) records, one per subLayer item
field_resolution.layerRelocates: Canonical AOUSD §7.6.1.2.4 layer field. The on-disk Crate FIELDS token name is 'relocates'; it maps to the document-model layerRelocates field. Value type 58 (Relocates) at minor>=11: uint64 count followed by alternating uint32 path-index source + uint32 path-index target entries. Encountering this type at minor<11 emits UnsupportedUsdcFeature.
field_resolution.documentation: FIELDS token name 'documentation'; value type 10 (string) inlined as uint32 string index into STRINGS
field_resolution.customLayerData: FIELDS token name 'customLayerData'; value type 31 (dictionary) offset-backed
field_resolution.framesPerSecond: FIELDS token name 'framesPerSecond'; value type 9 (double) offset-backed (or inlined when representable as float)

rejected_fields.policy: Strict AOUSD §7.6 conformance. A form-7 (Layer) spec whose FIELDS table binds a §7.6.1.8 Deprecated or §7.6.1.7 Out of Scope layer token is rejected with MalformedUsdcSection — these tokens are reserved by the spec and are no longer decoded into live document-model fields, even though real (OpenUSD-written) .usdc files may contain them.

storage_mapping.subLayer_offset_pairing: subLayers and subLayerOffsets are stored as parallel arrays. When the Crate FIELDS table authors subLayers without subLayerOffsets, the parser materializes default Retiming records (offset=0.0, scale=1.0) one per subLayer item. When both are authored, their lengths must match; mismatch emits MalformedUsdcSection per the format-neutral law in document-model-productions/layer-spec.contract.json#laws.

forbidden_field_enforcement.rule: Per document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission, layer specs admit only the union of shared metadata and layer_only fields. In the USDC encoding, a FIELDS entry whose token name is one of the prim_only, attribute_only, or relationship_only sets (e.g. specifier, typeName, primChildren-on-attribute, targetPaths) attached to a form-7 spec is a contract violation. The parser emits MalformedUsdcSection.

laws: a Crate SPECS entry with form=7 produces exactly the root layer spec at path '/'
primChildren is materialized from root prim storage when absent; when authored explicitly the stored TokenVector wins and root-prim storage must agree
subLayers (asset[] via type 12 + Array flag) and subLayerOffsets (LayerOffsetVector via type 49) must have matching lengths when both are authored
subLayerOffsets values are native Retiming records (offset:double, scale:double); raw dictionaries or JSON payloads are forbidden
relocates (type 58) is version-gated at Crate minor>=11; encountering it at lower versions emits UnsupportedUsdcFeature
the canonical document-model field is layerRelocates (§7.6.1.2.4); the on-disk Crate FIELDS token name is 'relocates' and maps to it
a form-7 spec binding a §7.6.1.8 deprecated or §7.6.1.7 out-of-scope layer token is rejected with MalformedUsdcSection per rejected_fields
layer specs reject the prim_only, attribute_only, and relationship_only field name sets per document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission
golden_groups: Crate form 7 produces the root layer spec at '/'
primChildren materialized from root prim storage when FIELDS omits it
primChildren preserved exactly when authored in Crate
subLayers without subLayerOffsets defaults to per-item Retiming(0.0, 1.0)
relocates (type 58) round-trip on a v0.11+ fixture; UnsupportedUsdcFeature on a v0.8 fixture
framesPerSecond / timeCodesPerSecond / startTimeCode / endTimeCode authored as doubles
forbidden prim-only / attribute-only / relationship-only field names attached to form-7 spec emit MalformedUsdcSection
